---
title: "todavia no se"
author: "Eva Kennedy y Antonia Cea"
format: html
editor: visual
---

}holahola nose q hare aqui

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(psych)
library(haven)
library(readxl)

View(elsoc_wide_2016_2023)

elsoc_wide_2016_2023 <- elsoc_wide_2016_2023 %>% select(s25_01_w02, s25_02_w02, s25_04_w02, s29_w02) # sobre capital cultural, si los padres...







```

sdkv\<sd
